name: Cocoa Syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine sugar, cocoa, and salt.
2. Gradually add hot water, stirring to keep the mixture smooth.
3. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture boils.
4. Continue boiling for 3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract.
6. Pour into a heatproof container and let cool to room temperature.
7. Cover and refrigerate. Use as a topping for ice cream and desserts or for chocolate-flavored drinks. About 2 cups of syrup can be made.
Variations:
Hot Cocoa: Add 1 to 2 tablespoons of the cocoa syrup to a mug of hot milk; stir until blended.
Cocoa Syrup Drink: Add 1 to 2 tablespoons of the cocoa syrup to a tall glass of cold milk; stir until blended.
